name: construction project managers handling 5–15 projects/month tool
description: For construction project managers processing 5–15 projects/month, compliance reporting delays cause project penalties. We automate report preparation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in generating timely health and safety compliance reports.
features: user-friendly dashboard for tracking compliance status
